<!-- d20pfsrd:rewritten -->
# Feral Champion

Contents

- Feral Blessing
- Sacred Claws (Su)
- Wild Shape (Su)

When a warpriest devotes himself to a god of the natural world, he is sometimes blessed with supernatural powers that allow him to evoke animalistic power and fury.

#### Feral Blessing

A feral champion must take the Animal blessing and does not gain a second blessing.

This alters blessings.

#### Sacred Claws (Su)

Rather than empowering a physical weapon, a feral champion grows claws as primary natural weapons on each hand. These claws deal damage as a warpriest’s sacred weapon and can be enhanced as such.

This alters sacred weapon.

#### Wild Shape (Su)

At 7th level, a feral champion gains wild shape, as the druid ability of the same name, and treats his warpriest level – 3 as his effective druid level for the purposes of this ability. However, a feral champion does not gain the ability to take on elemental or plant forms with wild shape. A feral champion can use wild shape once per day at 7th level and
